title: MCP Community Node not recognized as agent tool
symptom: When attempting to use the MCP community node as an agent tool, n8n throws an error stating 'Unrecognized node type: n8n-nodes-mcp.mcpClientTool'. This prevents the workflow from running successfully.
not_this_if: Node works in standard execution mode
No error when using other nodes
root_cause: The error occurs because the MCP community node may not be properly updated or installed, leading to n8n not recognizing the node type when used in the context of an agent tool.
fix_steps: Update the MCP community node to the latest version
Restart n8n to ensure all updates are applied
Test the workflow again to see if the error persists
agent_instruction: Update the MCP community node and restart n8n to resolve the issue.
